Slab Sell Strategy

Should you sell your stickers individually or encase 5 into a slab? Premium accounts for the blank slab cost ($0.70). When premium > 0%, slabbing earns more. "Last Sold" = median recent sale price on Steam.

Slabs Tracked
225
of 378 variants
Blank Slab Cost
$0.70
Factory Sealed slab item
Avg Slab Premium
+3153.7%
vs 5x sticker + slab cost
Worth Slabbing
128
57% have slab premium
You Can Slab
59
You hold 5+ of these, +$2361.55 extra

59 stickers you hold 5+ of would earn more sold as slabs — potential extra profit: A$2361.55

StickerQualityHeldIndividualTotal CostSlab PriceLast SoldVolPremiumStrategy

Only showing slabs with actual sales data (volume or median sale price). Listings without sales are excluded — anyone can list at any price.

Slab = 5 identical stickers encased in a blank slab ($0.70). Total Cost = 5x sticker + blank slab. "Last Sold" = median recent sale price. Premium = (slab price - total cost) / total cost. Positive = slabbing earns more.

Quality Breakdown

About Embroidered Stickers: Embroidered is a new quality tier introduced in Budapest 2025, replacing the previous Foil finish. It sits in the Remarkable (purple) rarity slot with ~16% drop rate. Holo was promoted from Remarkable to Exotic (~3.2% drop rate), making Holos significantly rarer than before. Community reception is mixed — the 3D embroidered effect looks stunning in menus but is harder to see when applied to weapons. As the first major with this tier, Budapest 2025 Embroidered stickers could become a unique collectible if Valve changes the format again. Drop rates: Paper ~80% | Embroidered ~16% | Holo ~3.2% | Gold ~0.64%

Sell Timing Recommendation

SELL @ March 2036

Based on weighted historical major performance (CS2-era majors weighted highest), the optimal sell window for Budapest 2025 stickers is around 10 Years after sale ends (~March 2036), when similar-age majors averaged +8750% ROI.

Reference majors at that age: Cologne 2014, Cologne 2015, Cluj-Napoca 2015, Columbus 2016, Cologne 2016, Krakow 2017, Boston 2018, London 2018, Katowice 2019, Berlin 2019

Capsule prices are approximate. Sale duration is the strongest predictor of capsule ROI — shorter sales = less supply = better returns. Austin 2025's 49-day sale vs Paris 2023's 146 days illustrates this clearly. Budapest's 53-day sale window (Jan 22 – Mar 15, 2026) is the 2nd shortest modern sale after Austin 2025 (49 days) — very bullish for scarcity.
